trans-unit.source: There are too many transactions on this address, more than your backend can handle. See more on setting up a stronger backend. Consider viewing this address on the official BCH Explorer website instead: https://bchexplorer.cash/address/
trans-unit.target: There are too many transactions on this address, more than your backend can handle. See more on setting up a stronger backend. Consider viewing this address on the official BCH Explorer website instead: https://bchexplorer.cash/address/

trans-unit.source: See mempool transactions, confirmed transactions, balance, and more for Bitcoin Cash address .
trans-unit.target: See mempool transactions, confirmed transactions, balance, and more for Bitcoin Cash address .

trans-unit.source: See mempool transactions, confirmed transactions, balance, and more for Bitcoin Cash wallet .
trans-unit.target: See mempool transactions, confirmed transactions, balance, and more for Bitcoin Cash wallet .

trans-unit.source: Your browser does not support this feature.
trans-unit.target: Tu explorador no soporta esta función

trans-unit.source: Significant Bitcoin Cash blocks, including halvings, hard forks, protocol upgrades, and other milestones — past and future.
trans-unit.target: Significant Bitcoin Cash blocks, including halvings, hard forks, protocol upgrades, and other milestones — past and future.

trans-unit.source: See the total number of unspent transaction outputs (UTXOs) on the Bitcoin Cash network over time.
trans-unit.target: See the total number of unspent transaction outputs (UTXOs) on the Bitcoin Cash network over time.

trans-unit.source: bchexplorer.cash merely provides data about the Bitcoin Cash network. It cannot help you with retrieving funds, wallet issues, etc. For any such requests, you need to get in touch with the entity that helped make the transaction (wallet software, exchange company, etc).
trans-unit.target: mempool.space tan solo proporciona información acerca de la red Bitcoin. No puede ayudarte a recuperar fondos, asundos con carteras, etc.Para estas solicitudes, necesitas ponerte en contacto con la entidad que te ayudó a hacer la transacción (software del monedero, casa de cambio, etc).
Indexando tasa de hash de la red

trans-unit.source: Amount being paid to miners in the past 144 blocks
trans-unit.target: Cantidad pagada a los mineros en los pasados 144 bloques

trans-unit.source: This transaction was seen in the mempool prior to mining
trans-unit.target: Este transacción fue visto en mempool antes de minado

trans-unit.source: Significant Bitcoin Cash blocks, including halvings, hard forks, protocol upgrades, and other milestones — past and future.
trans-unit.target: Significant Bitcoin Cash blocks, including halvings, hard forks, protocol upgrades, and other milestones — past and future.

trans-unit.source: See mempool size (in MB) and transactions per second (in B/s) visualized over time.
trans-unit.target: Ver tamaño de la mempool (en MB) y transacciones por segundo ( en B/s) a lo largo del tiempo.

trans-unit.source: See the average number of transactions per Bitcoin Cash block over time.
trans-unit.target: See the average number of transactions per Bitcoin Cash block over time.

trans-unit.source: Fee paid on average for each transaction in the past 144 blocks
trans-unit.target: Tasa media pagada por cada transacción en los últimos 144 bloques

trans-unit.source: This block does not belong to the main chain, it has been replaced by:
trans-unit.target: Este bloque no pertenece a la cadena principal, ha sido reemplazado por:

trans-unit.source: This transaction may have been added out-of-band
trans-unit.target: Es posible que este transacción se haya agregado fuera de banda

trans-unit.source: Based on average native transaction of 140 Bytes
trans-unit.target: Basado en el promedio de 140 Bytes de las transacciones segwit nativas

trans-unit.source: Get real-time status, addresses, fees, script info, and more for Bitcoin Cash transaction with txid .
trans-unit.target: Obtén estado en tiempo real, direcciones, tasas, información de script, y más para la transacción con txid .

trans-unit.source: This is a test network. Coins have no value.
trans-unit.target: Esta es una red de prueba. Las monedas no tienen valor.

trans-unit.source: This transaction was missing from our mempool prior to mining
trans-unit.target: Este transacción faltaba en nuestro mempool antes de minado

trans-unit.source: See Bitcoin Cash block rewards in BCH and USD visualized over time. Block rewards are the total funds miners earn from the block subsidy and fees.
trans-unit.target: See Bitcoin Cash block rewards in BCH and USD visualized over time. Block rewards are the total funds miners earn from the block subsidy and fees.

trans-unit.source: BCH Explorer is a blockchain and mempool explorer for the Bitcoin Cash community, created by Melroy van den Berg. It is a completely self-hosted without any trusted third-parties.
trans-unit.target: BCH Explorer is a blockchain and mempool explorer for the Bitcoin Cash community, created by Melroy van den Berg. It is a completely self-hosted without any trusted third-parties.

trans-unit.source: Usually places your transaction in between the second and third mempool blocks
trans-unit.target: Normalmente sitúa tu transacción entre los bloques segundo y tercero de la mempool

trans-unit.source: There are stale blocks at this height
trans-unit.target: Hay bloques obsoletos a esta altura

trans-unit.source: Waiting for it to appear in the mempool...
trans-unit.target: Esperando a que aparezca en la mempool...
Redirigiendo a la página de la transacción...

trans-unit.source: See Bitcoin Cash block sizes (MB) visualized over time.
trans-unit.target: See Bitcoin Cash block sizes (MB) visualized over time.

trans-unit.source: See the Bitcoin Cash price in USD visualized over time.
trans-unit.target: Ver el precio de Bitcoin en USD visualizado a lo largo del tiempo.

trans-unit.source: How to host my own instance?
trans-unit.target: How to host my own instance?
Error al cargar datos de la cartera.

trans-unit.source: Transaction cannot be broadcasted because it's missing or has an invalid signature
trans-unit.target: Transaction cannot be broadcasted because it's missing or has an invalid signature

trans-unit.source: See Bitcoin Cash block time variation over time.
trans-unit.target: See Bitcoin Cash block time variation over time.

trans-unit.source: This transaction conflicted with another version in our mempool
trans-unit.target: Este transacción entró en conflicto con otra versión en nuestro mempool

trans-unit.source: Overview of the mining pools on Bitcoin Cash.
trans-unit.target: Overview of the mining pools on Bitcoin Cash.

trans-unit.source: Only ~ sat/B was needed to get into this block
trans-unit.target: Solo ~ sat/B se necesitaban para entrar en este bloque

trans-unit.source: Either 2x the minimum, or the Low Priority rate (whichever is lower)
trans-unit.target: O bien 2x el mínimo, o la tasa de prioridad baja (lo que resulte menor)

trans-unit.source: If you like this project and use the explorer on a regular basis, please consider donating.
trans-unit.target: If you like this project and use the explorer on a regular basis, please consider donating.
Error al cargar datos de la dirección.

trans-unit.source: Usually places your transaction in between the first and second mempool blocks
trans-unit.target: Normalmente sitúa tu transacción entre el primer y segundo bloque de la mempool

trans-unit.source: By sponsoring me you are supporting my work and ensuring that the BCH Explorer project remains up-to-date, stable and available to the whole Bitcoin Cash community. As well as extending this BCH Explorer for specific BCH features. Are you interested in becoming an enterprise sponsor and getting your company listed on this site? Feel free to reach out via Telegram.
trans-unit.target: By sponsoring me you are supporting my work and ensuring that the BCH Explorer project remains up-to-date, stable and available to the whole Bitcoin Cash community. As well as extending this BCH Explorer for specific BCH features. Are you interested in becoming an enterprise sponsor and getting your company listed on this site? Feel free to reach out via Telegram.

trans-unit.source: Maintaining, improving and creating this BCH explorer costs a lot of time and effort. As a one-man operation, I spend a lot of personal time working on this project.
trans-unit.target: Maintaining, improving and creating this BCH explorer costs a lot of time and effort. As a one-man operation, I spend a lot of personal time working on this project.

trans-unit.source: Show more inputs to reveal fee data
trans-unit.target: Mostrar más inputs para revelar datos de tasa

trans-unit.source: See size, fee range, included transactions, audit (expected vs actual), and more for Bitcoin Cash block ().
trans-unit.target: Ver tamaño, peso, rango de tasas, incluyendo transacciones, y más para el bloque de Liquid ().

trans-unit.source: See the average mining fees earned per Bitcoin Cash block visualized in BCH and USD over time.
trans-unit.target: Ver las comisiones promedio de minería ganadas por bloque de Bitcoin, visualizadas en BTC y USD a lo largo del tiempo.
No estaré pronto en un futuro próximo
Error al cargar datos del pool.

trans-unit.source: Places your transaction in the first mempool block
trans-unit.target: Pone tu transacción en el primer bloque de la mempool
Lista de transacciones en bruto separadas por coma

trans-unit.source: See the most recent Bitcoin Cash blocks along with basic stats such as block height, block reward, block size, and more.
trans-unit.target: Ver los bloques de Bitcoin más recientes junto a estadísticas básicas como altura de bloque, tamaño y más.

trans-unit.source: The overall luck of all mining pools over the past week. A luck bigger than 100% means the average block time for the current epoch is less than 10 minutes.
trans-unit.target: La suerte general de todas las pools mineras en la última semana. Una suerte superior al 100% significa que el promedio de tiempo por bloque para la época actual es menor a 10 minutos.

trans-unit.source: The number of blocks found over the past week.
trans-unit.target: El número de bloques encontrados en la última semana.

trans-unit.source: Average fees per block in the past 144 blocks
trans-unit.target: Media de tasas por bloque en los últimos 144 bloques

trans-unit.source: View Bitcoin Cash ASERT difficulty adjustment deviation over time.
trans-unit.target: View Bitcoin Cash ASERT difficulty adjustment deviation over time.

trans-unit.source: Your balance is too low.Please top up your account.
trans-unit.target: Tu saldo es demasiado bajo.Por favor recarga tu cuenta.

trans-unit.source: select filter categories to highlight matching transactions
trans-unit.target: selecciona filtro de categorías para destacar transacciones destacadas

trans-unit.source: This transaction has a low transaction fee on L1, because of BCH
trans-unit.target: This transaction has a low transaction fee on L1, because of BCH
Error al decodificar la transacción, motivo:

trans-unit.source: See the total UTXO throughput and BCH transaction volume per Bitcoin Cash block over time.
trans-unit.target: See the total UTXO throughput and BCH transaction volume per Bitcoin Cash block over time.

trans-unit.source: How many unique pools found at least one block over the past week.
trans-unit.target: Cuantas pools únicas encontraron al menos un bloque en la última semana.
Por qué está este bloque vacío?

trans-unit.source: Transaction hex or base64 encoded PSBT
trans-unit.target: Hex de transacción o PSBT codificada en base64

trans-unit.source: No data to display yet. Try again later.
trans-unit.target: Aún no hay datos a mostrar. Prueba luego.

trans-unit.source: Provide a fallback fee if the finalized transaction size can't be estimated reliably (hidden scripts in P2SH).
trans-unit.target: Provide a fallback fee if the finalized transaction size can't be estimated reliably (hidden scripts in P2SH).

trans-unit.source: This transaction was projected to be included in the block
trans-unit.target: Este transacción estaba previsto para ser incluido en bloque

trans-unit.source: This node hasn't seen any stale blocks yet!
trans-unit.target: ¡Este nodo aún no ha visto ningún bloque huérfano!

trans-unit.source: Warning! This transaction involves deceptively similar addresses. It may be an address poisoning attack.
trans-unit.target: ¡Advertencia! Esta transacción involucra direcciones engañosamente similares. Puede ser un ataque de envenenamiento de direcciones.

trans-unit.source: There is a stale block at this height
trans-unit.target: Hay un bloque obsoleto a esta altura

trans-unit.source: This address is deceptively similar to another output. It may be part of an address poisoning attack.
trans-unit.target: Esta dirección es engañosamente similar a otra salida. Puede ser parte de un ataque de envenenamiento de direcciones.

trans-unit.source: This transaction ID appears twice in the blockchain as the coinbase of blocks and , due to a bug later mitigated by BIP-30.
trans-unit.target: Este ID de transacción aparece dos veces en la cadena de bloques como la coinbase de los bloques y , debido a un error mitigado posteriormente por BIP-30.

trans-unit.source: See the mining fees earned per Bitcoin Cash block compared to the Bitcoin Cash block subsidy, visualized in BCH and USD over time.
trans-unit.target: See the mining fees earned per Bitcoin Cash block compared to the Bitcoin Cash block subsidy, visualized in BCH and USD over time.

trans-unit.source: Broadcast a transaction to the Bitcoin Cash network using the transaction's hash.
trans-unit.target: Broadcast a transaction to the Bitcoin Cash network using the transaction's hash.

trans-unit.source: This transaction is stored locally in your browser. Broadcast it to add it to the mempool.
trans-unit.target: Esta transacción está almacenada localmente en tu navegador. Transmítela para añadirla a la mempool.

trans-unit.source: Double check that this transaction sends the funds back to the provided address before signing
trans-unit.target: Double check that this transaction sends the funds back to the provided address before signing
Error al cargar datos de bloque.

trans-unit.source: Search by student name or ID...
trans-unit.target: Buscar por nombre o ID de estudiante...

trans-unit.source: Explore the full Bitcoin Cash ecosystem
See stats for Bitcoin Cash transactions in the mempool: fee range, aggregate size, and more. Mempool blocks are updated in real-time as the network receives new transactions.
trans-unit.target: See stats for Bitcoin Cash transactions in the mempool: fee range, aggregate size, and more. Mempool blocks are updated in real-time as the network receives new transactions.

trans-unit.source: Learn more about the BCH Explorer open-source project. Discover enterprise sponsors, integrations, FOSS licensing, and more.
trans-unit.target: Más información sobre The Mempool Open Source Project® (Proyecto de código abierto Mempool): patrocinadores empresariales, patrocinadores individuales, integraciones, colaboradores, licencias de software libre y de código abierto, etc.

trans-unit.source: See size, weight, fee range, included transactions, audit (expected v actual), and more for Bitcoin block ().
trans-unit.target: Ver tamaño, peso, rango de tasas, incluyendo transacciones, auditoría (esperada y actual) para el bloque de Bitcoin ().

trans-unit.source: See Bitcoin Cash feerates visualized over time, including minimum and maximum feerates per block along with feerates at various percentiles.
trans-unit.target: Ver las tasas de comisión de Bitcoin visualizadas a lo largo del tiempo, incluidas las tasas de comisión mínimas y máximas por bloque junto con las tasas de comisión en varios percentiles.

trans-unit.source: See Bitcoin Cash block health visualized over time. Block health is a measure of how many expected transactions were included in an actual mined block. Expected transactions are determined using BCH Explorer's re-implementation of BCHN's transaction selection algorithm.
trans-unit.target: Ver la salud del bloque de Bitcoin visualizada a lo largo del tiempo. La salud del bloque mide el número de transacciones previstas que se incluyeron en un bloque minado real. Las transacciones previstas se determinan mediante la reimplementación de Mempool del algoritmo de selección de transacciones de Bitcoin Core.

trans-unit.source: See hashrate and difficulty for the Bitcoin network visualized over time.
trans-unit.target: Ver tasa de hash y dificultad para la red Bitcoin a lo largo del tiempo.

trans-unit.source: See the top Bitcoin Cash mining pools ranked by number of blocks mined, over your desired timeframe.
trans-unit.target: Ver las principales pools de minería ordenadas por número de bloques minados, en un periodo de tiempo determinado.

trans-unit.source: Documentation for our Electrum RPC interface: get instant, convenient, and reliable access to a Fulcrum instance.
trans-unit.target: Documentación para la interfaz Electrum RPC: obtén acceso instantáneo, cómodo y fiable a una instancia Esplora.

trans-unit.source: Get answers to common questions like: What is a mempool? What is a blockchain? How can I run my own instance of BCH Explorer? And more.
trans-unit.target: Obtén respuestas a preguntas comunes como: Qué es una mempool? Por qué no se confirma mi transacción? Cómo puedo correr mi instancia del Proyecto Open Source Mempool? Y más.

trans-unit.source: Documentation for the bchexplorer.cash REST API service: get info on addresses, transactions, blocks, fees, mining, and more.
trans-unit.target: Documentación para el servicio REST API: obtén información sobre direcciones, transacciones, bloques, tasas, la red Lightning y más.

trans-unit.source: Documentation for the bchexplorer.cash WebSocket API service: get real-time info on blocks, mempools, transactions, addresses, and more.
trans-unit.target: Documentación para el servicio Websocket API de mempool.space: obtén información en tiempo real sobre bloques, mempools, transacciones, direcciones y más.

trans-unit.source: Get real-time Bitcoin Cash mining stats like hashrate, difficulty adjustment, block rewards, pool dominance, and more.
trans-unit.target: Obtén estadísticas de minería en tiempo real como tasa de hash, ajuste de dificultad, recompensa por bloque, dominancia de pool, y más.

trans-unit.source: See mining pool stats for : most recent mined blocks, hashrate over time, total block reward to date, known coinbase addresses, and more.
trans-unit.target: Ver estadísticas de minería para : bloques minados recientes, hashrate en el tiempo, recompensas por bloque, direcciones coinbase conocidas, y más.

trans-unit.source: Preview a transaction to the Bitcoin network using the transaction's raw hex data.
trans-unit.target: Previsualiza una transacción en la red Bitcoin usando los datos hex sin procesar de la transacción.

trans-unit.source: See the most recent transactions on the Bitcoin Cash network, updated in real-time.
trans-unit.target: See the most recent transactions on the Bitcoin Cash network, updated in real-time.

trans-unit.source: See the most recent stale chain tips on the Bitcoin network.
trans-unit.target: Ver las puntas de cadena huérfanas más recientes en la red Bitcoin.

trans-unit.source: See Bitcoin Cash mining pool dominance visualized over time: see how top mining pools' share of total hashrate has fluctuated over time.
trans-unit.target: Ver la dominancia de pools de minería Bitcoin en el tiempo: ver cómo ha fluctuado en el tiempo la tasa de minería de las principales pools.
